{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.LENGTH' | translate }} {{ equipment.length }} cm
} @if (equipment.equipmentType === EquipmentType.HELMET) {
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.SIZE' | translate }} {{ equipment.size }} (cm)

{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.SOLE_LENGTH_MM' | translate }} {{ equipment.soleLengthMm }} mm

}
}

{{ 'INVENTORY.RESERVATIONS_TITLE' | translate }}

@if (reservationsLoading) {
{{ 'INVENTORY.RESERVATIONS_LOADING' | translate }}
} @if (reservationsError) {
{{ 'INVENTORY.RESERVATIONS_ERROR' | translate }}

{{ 'INVENTORY.NO_RESERVATIONS' | translate }}

} }
